title: MineQuery
body:
# MineQuery Mod

This is the overhaul version of MineQuery, supporting both Fabric and NeoForge by Architectury.

If you are looking for older versions, see [MineQuery-legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/minequery-legacy)(Modrinth, 1.17-1.20) or [MineQuery-legacy-legacy](https://github.com/Taskeren/mineQuery-legacy)(GitHub, 1.16).

## Features

### HarvestX
Disables destroying immature crops, the bottom block of cactus/sugar cane, and pumpkin/melon stems.

#### Replanting (ReSeeding)
Automatic replants crops on harvest with the seed held in your hand.

### NotHit
Disables attacking Villagers and Iron Golems.

### Command Shortcuts
Set a keybind to send a command or message.

### NotPlace!
Use a stick named 'NotPlace' to enable/disable placing on the sides of a block. Useful for Skyblock players trying to place a floor.

### Feed'em
Right-clicks all animals nearby. Can be used for breeding animals, or shearing sheep.
